scripts.sync-sdk: rm -rf node_modules/@backproto/sdk && mkdir -p node_modules/@backproto/sdk && cp -r ../sdk/dist node_modules/@backproto/sdk/dist && cp ../sdk/package.json node_modules/@backproto/sdk/package.json && sed -i.bak 's/.json";/.json" with { type: "json" };/g' node_modules/@backproto/sdk/dist/abis/index.js && rm -f node_modules/@backproto/sdk/dist/abis/index.js.bak
